name: nx_open_integrations
description: Network Optix Meta Video Management Platform open source integration examples - the source code and specifications which show how to integrate a third-party solution with the Nx Meta Video Management Platform (VMP) and thus all Powered-By-Nx products, including Nx Video Management System (VMS).
description_ja: Network Optix Meta Video Management Platformのオープンソース統合サンプル — サードパーティソリューションをNx Meta VMP（およびNx VMSを含むPowered-By-Nx製品全般）と統合する方法を示すソースコードと仕様。
